comment: dark-factory M22 enterprise tier: a STRICTER variant of the M17 conservative profile (scripts/seccomp/enterprise.json). Same shape (defaultAction SCMP_ACT_ALLOW -- this is NOT a default-deny allowlist profile, same honest-scope note applies: see dark-factory/references/enterprise.md), plus additional denials for keyring/keyctl manipulation (keyctl, add_key, request_key -- kernel keyring is a cross-process secret store an untrusted builder has no legitimate reason to touch), process accounting (acct), disk-quota manipulation (quotactl), and raw I/O port access (ioperm, iopl -- x86-only privileged I/O primitives). Selectable via enterprise.seccomp_profile (M22 Task 1); operators who want the stricter posture point at this file instead of the M17 default. Live-probed the same way as the default profile by df_container.probe_seccomp.
